description: TIMELESS STYLE FOR EVERY BABY GIRLS: Introducing our Frilly Lace Newborn Socks, the perfect blend of comfort and classic style. These socks are designed to keep your little ones cosy while complementing any outfit with their simplicity and versatility. A FIT FOR EVERY GROWTH SPURT: Available in three age-appropriate sizes (0-0), 0-3 Months (0-2.5), 6-12 Months (12-24). Months these socks are tailored to ensure a snug and comfortable fit as your child grows. Say goodbye to constantly replacing too-small socks. SUPER SOFT PLAIN SOCKS: Embrace the unparalleled softness of our Super Soft Socks. Crafted from high-quality materials, these socks offer a heavenly touch your baby will adore. Say goodbye to discomfort and hello to a world of cosiness with every step. CLASSIC COLORS FOR EVERY OCCASION: Simplicity meets sophistication with our range of timeless colors: Baby Pink and White. These shades effortlessly match any outfit, making them a staple in your baby wardrobe. SUPERIOR COMFORT & DURABILITY: Crafted from a premium blend of 78% Cotton, 20% Polyester, and 2% Elastane, these socks offer the ultimate comfort for your baby feet. The cotton ensures breathability, while the elastane adds a touch of stretch for a secure fit.
